CustomField.label: BiOp Reinit: New Species Listing
CustomField.description: ESA §7 BiOp reinitiation trigger per 50 CFR §402.16(a)(1). When checked by a field inspector, NEPA_BiOp_Reinitiation_Checker fires and creates a High-priority ESA Coordinator Task if an active BiOp exists on the parent IndividualApplication. Also adds +12 pts to nepa_challenge_risk_delta__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: [50 CFR §402.16(a)(1)] New species listed or critical habitat designated that may be affected. Field detection: Cross-check project location against updated ECOS critical habitat polygons at each inspection
